chatbot.title: Atlas Travel Assistant
chatbot.welcomeMessage: Hello. I can help you find hotels, browse transports, manage reservations, and guide you to the right page.
chatbot.welcomeTitle: Start with a quick travel task
chatbot.welcomeDescription: Ask a question or choose one of the suggestions below to jump into hotels, transports, reservations, login help, or email verification guidance.
chatbot.inputPlaceholder: Ask for help with hotels, transports, reservations, login, or admin access...
chatbot.errorMessage: We could not reach the travel assistant right now. Please try again.
chatbot.networkError: The assistant service is unavailable. Please check that the Django API is running.
chatbot.helpPrompt: Try messages like “I want a hotel in Paris” or “How do I cancel my reservation?”.

footer.brandSubtitle: Professional journeys for business and leisure.
footer.description: Plan hotels, transport, and curated packages with a frontend designed for clear traveler experiences and scalable agency workflows.

bottom.rights: Atlas Travel Agency. All rights reserved.
bottom.tagline: Designed for modern booking, planning, and traveler support.

hero.title: Professional travel booking for hotels, transport, and memorable journeys.
hero.description: Atlas Travel helps agencies and independent travelers move from searching to booking with a clear, elegant interface built for confidence and speed.
hero.highlightDescription: A polished travel flow with flights, airport transfers, and a premium city stay.

services.title: Travel services designed around real booking needs.
services.description: From flights and hotels to curated packages and ongoing support, the experience is built to feel trustworthy, efficient, and easy to navigate.

flights.title: Flights
flights.description: Organize reliable departures, ticketing, and flight options for business or leisure.

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.description: Match travelers with curated properties, clean room options, and strong location value.

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Bundle stays, transport, and activities into memorable travel programs.

support.title: Support
support.description: Keep travelers informed with responsive assistance before, during, and after each trip.

whyChooseUs.title: A dependable travel partner for business trips and premium escapes.
whyChooseUs.description: The interface is structured to support confident decisions, realistic travel planning, and a professional agency presentation.

itinerary.title: Experienced itinerary design
itinerary.description: We combine destination knowledge with business-ready planning so every trip feels intentional.

coordination.title: Fast booking coordination
coordination.description: Hotels, transport, and traveler details are organized clearly for quicker confirmations.

care.title: Consistent traveler care
care.description: Our process is built to reduce friction, manage changes, and keep journeys on track.

destinations.title: Popular offers that make your agency feel ready for real customers.
destinations.description: These highlighted destination cards show how featured trips or promotional offers can be presented in a modern travel storefront.

marrakech.name: Marrakech Escape
marrakech.description: A premium city break with boutique stays, cultural tours, and guided medina experiences.

paris.name: Paris Business Stopover
paris.description: Smart central accommodation and smooth transfers for meetings, conferences, and executive travel.

dubai.name: Dubai Premium Break
dubai.description: Luxury city views, airport assistance, and curated transport for high-comfort travel plans.

cta.title: Ready to turn this polished UI into a full booking flow?
cta.description: The frontend is now shaped like a realistic agency platform, making it easier to connect forms, search filters, and live API data next.

aside.title: Sign in to manage travelers and bookings.
aside.description: Access reservations, hotel inquiries, transport requests, and client updates from one central dashboard.

checklist.review: Review upcoming itineraries and booking requests.
checklist.track: Track hotels, transport, and traveler support tasks.
checklist.organize: Keep your agency workflow organized across every destination.

card.title: Welcome back
card.description: Sign in with your agency email to continue planning and managing trips.

form.verificationNotice: If your account is new, verify your email before trying to access protected areas.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

errors.emailVerificationRequired: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.network: The server could not be reached. Please check that the Django API is running.
errors.generic: We could not sign you in right now. Please try again.

success.emailVerified: Your email has been verified. You can sign in now.

aside.title: Register your agency and start building polished travel experiences.
aside.description: Set up your account to manage hotel selections, transport coordination, and customer communication from one place.

checklist.access: Organize team access and client communication in one dashboard.
checklist.offers: Prepare package offers, reservations, and transport bookings faster.
checklist.scale: Scale from mock data today to real API-driven workflows next.

card.title: Create your account
card.description: Fill in the fields below to set up a travel-agency workspace.

form.passwordHint: Use at least {{count}} characters for a secure password.
form.verificationNotice: We will send a verification code to your email before your first login.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{count}} characters long.

errors.network: The server could not be reached. Please check that the Django API is running.
errors.generic: We could not create your account right now. Please try again.

success.message: Your account has been created successfully. Please verify your email next.

aside.title: Confirm your email before entering the platform.
aside.description: We sent a short verification code to your inbox so we can protect your workspace and keep the login flow secure.

checklist.stepOne: Enter the same email address you used during registration.
checklist.stepTwo: Paste the verification code from the email message.
checklist.stepThree: Request a new code anytime if the first one expires.

card.title: Verify your email
card.description: Complete this step to activate your account and continue to sign in.

form.helper: Verification codes expire after a short time for better account security.
form.resendPrompt: Did not receive the message or need a fresh code?

status.loginRedirect: Please verify your email to complete sign-in.

success.verified: Email verified successfully. Redirecting you to sign in...
success.resent: If your account still needs verification, a new code has been sent.

errors.network: The server could not be reached. Please check that the Django API is running.
errors.generic: We could not verify your email right now. Please try again.

status.error: We could not load this hotel right now. Please try again.
status.notFoundTitle: This hotel is not available in the catalog.
status.notFoundDescription: The listing may have been removed or is no longer active. Return to the hotel catalog to keep exploring.

transportDetail.summary: Review the route, timing, and seat availability before moving to a future reservation flow.

fields.noNotes: Travel notes will appear here once provided.

status.error: We could not load this transport right now. Please try again.
status.notFoundTitle: This transport option is not available right now.
status.notFoundDescription: The route may have been removed or is no longer active. Return to the transport listing to explore other options.

auth.loginRequired: Please sign in before creating a reservation.

cancel.confirmation: Do you want to cancel this reservation for {{item}}?

success.created: Your reservation has been created successfully.
success.cancelled: Your reservation has been cancelled successfully.

errors.generic: We could not save your reservation right now. Please try again.
errors.network: The server could not be reached. Please check that the Django API is running.
errors.loadList: We could not load your reservations right now. Please try again.
errors.alreadyCancelled: This reservation has already been cancelled.

hotelForm.title: Reserve this hotel
hotelForm.description: Choose your stay dates and room details to send your reservation request.

transportForm.title: Reserve this transport
transportForm.description: Add your traveler details and submit your transport reservation request.
transportForm.specialRequestPlaceholder: Add any seating, luggage, or comfort notes for this reservation.

page.title: Track the trips and stays you have already reserved.
page.description: This protected page loads your real reservations from the Django API so travelers can review upcoming bookings in one place.
page.emptyTitle: Your reservation list is still empty.
page.emptyDescription: Once you reserve a hotel or transport option, it will appear here with its current status and booking details.

errors.network: The server could not be reached. Please check that the Django API is running.
errors.dashboard: We could not load the admin dashboard right now. Please try again.
errors.hotels: We could not load admin hotel data right now. Please try again.
errors.hotelSave: We could not save hotel changes right now. Please review the form and try again.
errors.hotelDelete: We could not delete this hotel right now. Please try again.
errors.transports: We could not load admin transport data right now. Please try again.
errors.transportSave: We could not save transport changes right now. Please review the form and try again.
errors.transportDelete: We could not delete this transport right now. Please try again.
errors.reservations: We could not load admin reservation data right now. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Operations dashboard for the agency workspace.
dashboard.description: This admin area gives authenticated administrators a management workspace for inventory oversight, reservation monitoring, and hotel and transport CRUD operations.

hotels.label: Active hotels
hotels.note: Counted from the admin hotel inventory.

transports.label: Active transports
transports.note: Counted from the admin transport inventory.

reservations.label: Total reservations
reservations.note: Loaded from the admin-wide reservation endpoint: {{count}}.

activity.title: Visible catalog signals
activity.description: Until a dedicated activity feed is added, the dashboard surfaces a small sample from current admin inventory and reservation data.
activity.empty: Recent admin activity will appear here once more management endpoints are connected.

hotels.title: Manage the hotel catalog from one admin workspace.
hotels.description: Create, update, and remove hotel inventory while keeping pricing, room counts, and active status aligned with the public catalog.
hotels.managementDescription: Use this panel to add new hotels, update existing inventory, and remove listings that should no longer appear in the system.
hotels.emptyTitle: There are no hotels available to review.
hotels.emptyDescription: Create your first hotel listing to start building the accommodation catalog.

messages.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete the hotel {{name}}?

form.description: Complete the fields below to keep the hotel catalog accurate and presentation-ready.

transports.title: Manage routes, schedules, and transport availability.
transports.description: Create, update, and remove transport items while keeping route timing, seat inventory, pricing, and service level consistent.
transports.managementDescription: Use this panel to manage flights, trains, and buses that appear across the transport catalog and admin overview.
transports.emptyTitle: There are no transport options available to review.
transports.emptyDescription: Create your first transport option to start building route coverage.

messages.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete the transport entry for {{company}}?

form.description: Complete the route, timing, seat, and service details below to keep transport operations accurate.

reservations.title: Monitor reservations across the full platform.
reservations.description: This section gives administrators a cross-account view of booking activity through the admin reservation endpoint.
reservations.scopeNotice: This page uses the admin reservation API and is protected by backend admin-role checks.
reservations.emptyTitle: There are no reservations available in the current admin view.
reservations.emptyDescription: Once reservations are created in the system, they will appear here for operational review.

profile.title: Welcome, {{name}}
profile.description: Your account is now connected to the Django API, and this protected page reads from the authenticated frontend state.

next.title: Protected space ready for the next step
next.description: Future reservation, checkout, and traveler management pages can use the same private-route guard and shared auth context.

notFound.title: This destination is not on the map yet.
notFound.description: The page you requested may have moved or does not exist. Head back to the main experience and continue exploring hotels, transport, and travel offers.

hotels.pageTitle: Curated stays for business travel, city breaks, and premium vacations.
hotels.intro: This listing page uses realistic hotel cards, strong hierarchy, and a clean filter layout so it already feels close to a production booking experience.

filters.title: Search accommodations
filters.description: Search by destination, stay dates, and budget range. The fields are UI-only for now and ready to connect to future backend filtering.

hotels.summary: {{count}} curated hotel options ready for search and detail pages.

status.loading: Loading hotels from the live catalog...
status.error: We could not load hotel listings right now. Please try again.
status.empty: No hotels matched your current filters.

descriptions.atlasMarina: Modern waterfront rooms, fast check-in, and direct access to key business districts.
descriptions.riadLumiere: Elegant riad interiors with spa access, curated excursions, and intimate courtyard dining.
descriptions.blueHorizon: Spacious suites near the port with flexible bookings for couples and work trips alike.
descriptions.skylineGrand: High-rise comfort with airport pickup options, premium lounges, and skyline dining.
descriptions.seineResidence: A polished central stay built for short business visits, events, and quick city access.
descriptions.costaSol: Bright coastal rooms with local experiences, easy transfers, and flexible stay packages.

transports.pageTitle: Compare flights, trains, and transfer options in one polished booking view.
transports.intro: The transport page now behaves like a realistic reservation screen, combining route filters with a structured list of available services.

filters.title: Search transport options
filters.description: Choose a departure point, destination, date, and transport type. This is a clean frontend-only filter UI, ready for backend integration later.

transports.summary: {{count}} transport options displayed with route, date, and pricing details.

card.noNotes: Travel details will appear here once provided.

status.loading: Loading transport options from the live schedule...
status.error: We could not load transport options right now. Please try again.
status.empty: No transport options matched your current filters.

notes.atlasAirConnect: Direct evening departure with business-friendly schedule.
notes.maghrebRail: Comfortable city-to-city connection with lounge access.
notes.saharaLine: Affordable transfer with reserved seating and onboard Wi-Fi.
notes.blueSky: Long-haul option with generous baggage allowance.
notes.euroCity: Fast intercity rail with priority boarding and quiet carriages.
notes.atlasShuttle: Reliable arrival transfer option for solo travelers and groups.
